title: lettsomia capitata
intro: Lettsomia capitata, also known as the New Zealand fern-leaved lettuce or Lettuce-leaved Lettsomia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteliaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lettsomia capitata include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
